title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched SuperComputer, a cloud platform enabling AI agents to build, deploy, and run software in an always-on Ubuntu environment with integrated database, storage, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment capabilities. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live software execution, allowing agents to manage the full application lifecycle.
